questions.title: Sigmoid Derivative
questions.description: Implement the derivative of the sigmoid function. Recall: sigmoid'(x) = sigmoid(x) * (1 - sigmoid(x)).

questions.title: ReLU Derivative
questions.description: Implement the derivative of the ReLU function.

blanks.hint: ReLU derivative is 1 when x > 0, else 0.

questions.title: Chain Rule - Gradient through Linear + ReLU
questions.description: Given upstream gradient dL/da1, compute dL/dW1 for a layer: z1 = x @ W1 + b1, a1 = relu(z1). x has shape (N, D_in), W1 has shape (D_in, D_out).

blanks.hint: ReLU passes gradient only where z1 > 0.
dW = x^T @ dz (chain rule through the linear layer).
